name: A Custom Property has been Disabled
notes:
This rule triggers when a custom property expression is disabled due to performance problems with the custom property expression.

Note: This rule can be tuned as needed to enable email notifications.
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (38750097) Custom property disabled
TD_list: APPLY A Custom Property has been Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (38750097) Custom property disabled
